---
params:
  ld_block: "EUR/1/153358890-156424168"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
title: "Clustering report LD Block: `r params$ld_block`"
---

```{r setup, message = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, fig.align = "center", warning = F)

library(igraph)
library(ggplot2)

source("../../pipeline_steps/constants.R")

# LD block as ancestry/chr/start-stop (same string as pipeline / ld_block_data_dir layout)
ld_block <- params$ld_block
block_data_dir <- file.path(ld_block_data_dir, ld_block)

h4_threshold <- posterior_prob_h4_threshold
subgraph_density_theshold <- 0.6

finemapped_file <- file.path(block_data_dir, "finemapped_studies.tsv")
coloc_file <- file.path(block_data_dir, "coloc_pairwise_results.tsv.gz")
cluster_obj <- file.path(block_data_dir, "igraph_clustered_results.rds")
problemsnp_file <- file.path(block_data_dir, "problematic_finemapped_snps.tsv")

studies_file <- file.path(current_results_dir, "studies_processed.tsv.gz")
truthset_file <- "data/tipairs_launched_truthset.tsv"

message("LD Block: ", ld_block)
message("Block data dir: ", block_data_dir)

```

```{r read_in_data}

coloc_results <- vroom::vroom(coloc_file, delim = '\t', show_col_types = F)
coloc_results_filt <- coloc_results |> dplyr::filter(ignore == FALSE, h4 >= h4_threshold)

finemapped_studies <- vroom::vroom(finemapped_file, col_types = finemapped_column_types, show_col_types = F) |>
  dplyr::filter(variant_type == "common") |>
  dplyr::arrange(unique_study_id)

clustered_results <- readRDS(cluster_obj)
clusters <- clustered_results$groups

studies_processed <- vroom::vroom(studies_file, show_col_types = F)

if (file.exists(problemsnp_file)) {
  problem_snps <- vroom::vroom(problemsnp_file, show_col_types = F)
} else {
  problem_snps <- data.frame()
}
```

```{r load_truthset}

truthset <- vroom::vroom(truthset_file, show_col_types = F)

# Build lookup: for non-phenotype studies, gene -> study_name
gene_study_lookup <- studies_processed |>
  dplyr::filter(data_type != "phenotype" & !is.na(gene)) |>
  dplyr::select(study_name, gene, data_type)

# Match truthset rows to finemapped studies in this block:
# - target (gene) matches gene_study_lookup$gene -> gives study_name for the molecular study
# - trait_gpmap matches finemapped_studies$study for the phenotype study
block_studies <- unique(finemapped_studies$study)

truthset_edges <- truthset |>
  dplyr::filter(pairwisecoloc_support == TRUE &
                  (gpmap_support == FALSE | preinfomap_support == FALSE)) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(gene_study_lookup, by = c("target" = "gene"), relationship = "many-to-many") |>
  dplyr::filter(study_name %in% block_studies & trait_gpmap %in% block_studies) |>
  dplyr::distinct(study_name, trait_gpmap, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Build set of unique_study_id pairs for edge highlighting
# A single study can have multiple unique_study_ids (credible sets) in this block
truthset_unique_pairs <- truthset_edges |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    finemapped_studies |> dplyr::select(study, unique_study_id) |> dplyr::rename(uid_mol = unique_study_id),
    by = c("study_name" = "study"), relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    finemapped_studies |> dplyr::select(study, unique_study_id) |> dplyr::rename(uid_pheno = unique_study_id),
    by = c("trait_gpmap" = "study"), relationship = "many-to-many"
  )

message("Truthset edges to highlight in this block: ", nrow(truthset_edges))
message("Truthset unique_study_id pairs: ", nrow(truthset_unique_pairs))
```

### Coloc results:

```{r summarise_coloc_hits}

h4_cuts <- seq(0,1, by = 0.1)
coloc_results$h4_cuts <- cut(coloc_results$h4, breaks = h4_cuts)

message("No. studies in LD block: ", nrow(finemapped_studies))
message("No. Pairwise colocs in LD block: ", nrow(coloc_results))
message("Colocs at H4 range:")

tab <- table(coloc_results$h4_cuts)
names(tab) <- sub(",","-",sub("\\(","",sub("]","",names(tab))))
tab

clusters$study <- sub("_EUR.*","",clusters$unique_study_id)

check_clusters <- clusters |> dplyr::group_by(component, study) |> dplyr::summarise(n_regions = dplyr::n())
```

### Truthset pairs in this LD block

```{r truthset_table, results='asis'}

if (nrow(truthset_unique_pairs) > 0) {
  pair_info <- truthset_unique_pairs |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      coloc_results |> dplyr::select(unique_study_a, unique_study_b, h4, PP.H3.abf, PP.H4.abf, ignore),
      by = c("uid_mol" = "unique_study_a", "uid_pheno" = "unique_study_b")
    )

  # Also check reversed direction
  pair_info_rev <- truthset_unique_pairs |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      coloc_results |> dplyr::select(unique_study_a, unique_study_b, h4, PP.H3.abf, PP.H4.abf, ignore),
      by = c("uid_mol" = "unique_study_b", "uid_pheno" = "unique_study_a")
    )

  pair_info <- dplyr::bind_rows(pair_info, pair_info_rev) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(h4)) |>
    dplyr::distinct()

  # Add min_p for each study
  min_p_lookup <- finemapped_studies |> dplyr::select(unique_study_id, min_p)

  pair_info <- pair_info |>
    dplyr::left_join(min_p_lookup |> dplyr::rename(min_p_mol = min_p), by = c("uid_mol" = "unique_study_id")) |>
    dplyr::left_join(min_p_lookup |> dplyr::rename(min_p_pheno = min_p), by = c("uid_pheno" = "unique_study_id")) |>
    dplyr::select(
      target, trait_gpmap, trait_name_gpmap, data_type,
      gpmap_support, preinfomap_support,
      uid_mol, uid_pheno,
      h4, PP.H3.abf, PP.H4.abf,
      min_p_mol, min_p_pheno
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(h4))

  knitr::kable(pair_info, digits = 4, caption = "Truthset pairs present in this LD block (pairwisecoloc_support=T & missing gpmap/preinfomap support)")
} else {
  message("No truthset pairs found in this LD block")
}
```

### Clustering studies:

#### Original graph:

```{r plot_clustering, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 6}

studies <- sub("_EUR.*", "", V(clustered_results$unpruned_graph)$name)

g <- clustered_results$unpruned_graph
g_comps <- igraph::components(g)

message("Number of graph verts: ", length(igraph::V(g)))
message("Number of graph edges: ", length(igraph::E(g)))

g_layout <- igraph::layout_with_kk(g)

plot(g,
     vertex.label = NA, 
     vertex.size = 3,
     vertex.color = "black",
     edge.width = 2,
     layout = g_layout,
     main = "Original graph")
```

#### Original subgraphs:

```{r subgraphs}

csize <- table(g_comps$csize) |> as.data.frame()
colnames(csize) <- c("Component size", "Freq")

message("Original cluster size and frequency:")
csize

comp_num <- as.numeric(which(table(g_comps$membership) > 1))

g_subgraphs <- lapply(comp_num, function(x){
  igraph::induced_subgraph(g, vids = igraph::V(g)[g_comps$membership == x])
})

g_density <- sapply(g_subgraphs, function(x){igraph::edge_density(x)})

# Build set of truthset edge pairs for highlighting
truthset_highlight_pairs <- NULL
if (nrow(truthset_unique_pairs) > 0) {
  truthset_highlight_pairs <- rbind(
    data.frame(V1 = truthset_unique_pairs$uid_mol, V2 = truthset_unique_pairs$uid_pheno, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    data.frame(V1 = truthset_unique_pairs$uid_pheno, V2 = truthset_unique_pairs$uid_mol, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  )
}

plot_subgraphs <- function(subgraph, colour_verts, highlight_pairs = NULL){
  g_density <- igraph::edge_density(subgraph)
  g_layout <- igraph::layout_with_kk(subgraph)
  
  if(colour_verts == FALSE){
    col_vert = "black"
    col_edge = "grey"
    size_vert = 3
  }else{
    col_vert = V(subgraph)$community
    communities <- unique(col_vert[col_vert > 0])
    v_colours <- c("white", rainbow(length(communities)))
    names(v_colours) <- c(0, communities)
    col_vert = as.vector(v_colours[as.character(col_vert)])
    
    col_edge = E(subgraph)$pruned
    col_edge = ifelse(col_edge == 0, "grey", "red")
    size_vert = 6
  }

  # Highlight truthset edges in gold
  edge_width <- rep(2, length(E(subgraph)))
  if (!is.null(highlight_pairs) && nrow(highlight_pairs) > 0) {
    el <- igraph::as_edgelist(subgraph)
    for (k in seq_len(nrow(el))) {
      v1 <- el[k, 1]
      v2 <- el[k, 2]
      match_fwd <- any(highlight_pairs$V1 == v1 & highlight_pairs$V2 == v2)
      match_rev <- any(highlight_pairs$V1 == v2 & highlight_pairs$V2 == v1)
      if (match_fwd || match_rev) {
        col_edge[k] <- "gold"
        edge_width[k] <- 4
      }
    }
  }
  
  plot(subgraph,
       vertex.label = NA,
       vertex.size = size_vert,
       edge.width = edge_width,
       vertex.color = col_vert,
       edge.color = col_edge,
       layout = g_layout)
}

plot_nrows <- ceiling(length(g_subgraphs)/10)
fig_height <- plot_nrows*2
```

### Clustering (with infomap):

```{r infomap_clustering, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 6}

par(mfrow = c(1,1))

clustered_graph <- clustered_results$pruned_graph
gp_comps <- igraph::components(clustered_graph)

comp_num_pruned <- as.numeric(which(table(gp_comps$membership) > 1))

gp_subgraphs <- lapply(comp_num_pruned, function(x){
  igraph::induced_subgraph(clustered_graph, vids = igraph::V(clustered_graph)[gp_comps$membership == x])
})

V(g)$community <- V(clustered_graph)$component[match(V(g)$name, V(clustered_graph)$name)]
V(g)$community[is.na(V(g)$community)] <- 0

pruned_edges <- clustered_results$pruned_edges
pruned_edge_ids <- get.edge.ids(g, t(as.matrix(pruned_edges)))

E(g)$pruned <- 0
E(g)$pruned[pruned_edge_ids] <- 1

plot(g,
     vertex.label = NA, 
     vertex.size = 3,
     vertex.color = V(g)$community,
     edge.color = "grey",
     edge.width = 2,
     layout = g_layout, main = "Original graph (coloured by identified infomap communities)")

plot_nrows_set <- ceiling(sum(g_density < subgraph_density_theshold)/5)
fig_height_set <- plot_nrows_set*4
```

```{r plot_subgraphs_coloured, fig.width = 20, fig.height = 28}

g_subgraphs <- lapply(comp_num, function(x){
  igraph::induced_subgraph(g, vids = igraph::V(g)[g_comps$membership == x])
})

lowdensity_subgraphs <- g_subgraphs[which(g_density<1)]

par(mfrow = c(plot_nrows_set,5))
invisible(sapply(lowdensity_subgraphs, plot_subgraphs, colour_verts = TRUE, highlight_pairs = truthset_highlight_pairs))
```

```{r select_split_subgraphs}

split_subgraph_info <- lapply(seq_along(lowdensity_subgraphs), function(i) {
  sg <- lowdensity_subgraphs[[i]]
  n_nodes <- length(V(sg))
  communities <- V(sg)$community
  communities <- communities[communities > 0]
  n_communities <- length(unique(communities))
  data.frame(
    index = i,
    n_nodes = n_nodes,
    n_communities = n_communities,
    density = igraph::edge_density(sg)
  )
}) |> dplyr::bind_rows()

candidates <- split_subgraph_info |>
  dplyr::filter(n_communities > 1 & n_nodes < 100) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n_communities), dplyr::desc(n_nodes))

n_to_show <- min(3, nrow(candidates))

if (n_to_show == 0) {
  message("No subgraphs found with multiple communities and < 100 nodes")
} else {
  selected <- candidates[1:n_to_show, ]
  message("Selected ", n_to_show, " subgraphs for exploration:")
  print(selected)
}
```

### Region overlay

```{r region_plot_functions}

plot_region <- function(subgraph){
  
  study_ids <- V(subgraph)$name
  finemapped <- finemapped_studies |> dplyr::filter(unique_study_id %in% study_ids)
  
  region_files <- finemapped$file
  regions <- lapply(region_files, function(x) {
    stopifnot(file.exists(x))
    data.table::fread(x)
  })
  names(regions) <- finemapped$study
  regions <- mapply(function(x,y){
    x <- x |> 
      dplyr::mutate(study_id = y,
                    scaled_LBF = LBF/max(LBF)) |>
      dplyr::filter(SE != 1)
    return(x)} , x = regions, y = finemapped$unique_study_id, SIMPLIFY = F)
  
  if(!("community" %in% vertex_attr_names(subgraph))){
    V(subgraph)$community <- V(subgraph)$component
  }
    
  component <- V(subgraph)$community
  names(component) <- V(subgraph)$name
  
  regions_combined <- data.table::rbindlist(regions, fill = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::mutate(component = component[study_id]) |>
    dplyr::filter(component != 0)
  
  tag_snp <- clusters |> 
    dplyr::filter(component %in% unique(V(subgraph)$community)) |> dplyr::select(component, snp) |> 
    unique()
  
  cluster_details <- regions_combined |> 
    dplyr::group_by(component) |> 
    dplyr::summarise(max(LBF)) |> 
    as.data.frame() |> 
    dplyr::arrange(desc(`max(LBF)`)) |>
    dplyr::left_join(tag_snp) |>
    dplyr::mutate(bp = as.numeric(sub(".*:(.*)_.*_.*","\\1",snp)))

  regions_combined <- regions_combined |> 
    dplyr::mutate(component = factor(component, levels = cluster_details$component)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(component, study_id)
  
  col_vert = V(subgraph)$community
  communities <- unique(col_vert[col_vert > 0])
  v_colours <- c("white", rainbow(length(communities)))
  names(v_colours) <- c(0, communities)
  
  p1 <- ggplot(regions_combined, 
         aes(x = BP/1000000, y = scaled_LBF, colour = as.factor(component))) +
    geom_point(size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = cluster_details$bp/1000000) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(data = cluster_details, aes(x = bp/1000000, y = 1, label = snp), show.legend = F, max.overlaps = 30) +
    scale_colour_manual(name = "Cluster ID", values = v_colours) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(x = "Position (Mb)", y = "Scaled LBF")
  
  x_range <- c(min(cluster_details$bp) - 100000, max(cluster_details$bp) + 100000)
  
  p2 <- p1 + scale_x_continuous(limits = x_range / 1000000)

  gridExtra::arrangeGrob(p1, p2, ncol = 2, widths = c(0.55, 0.45))
}
```

#### Exploration of selected split subgraphs

For each selected subgraph, the network graph is shown first, followed by the overlayed manhattan plot.

```{r explore_selected_subgraphs, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 8, results='asis'}

if (n_to_show > 0) {
  for (j in seq_len(n_to_show)) {
    idx <- selected$index[j]
    sg <- lowdensity_subgraphs[[idx]]
    n_nodes <- selected$n_nodes[j]
    n_comms <- selected$n_communities[j]

    cat("\n\n##### Subgraph ", idx, ": ", n_nodes, " nodes, ", n_comms, " communities, density ",
        round(selected$density[j], 3), "\n\n", sep = "")

    par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
    plot_subgraphs(subgraph = sg, colour_verts = TRUE, highlight_pairs = truthset_highlight_pairs)

    tryCatch({
      gridExtra::grid.arrange(plot_region(subgraph = sg))
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Overlay plot failed for subgraph ", idx, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}
```
